title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Allcargo Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Allcargo Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!
